prompt_text: Suggest a fruit-based snack that is high in antioxidants.
response_text:
A fruit-based snack that is high in antioxidants is a combination of berries, specifically blueberries, strawberries, and raspberries, mixed with some pomegranate seeds. 

Blueberries are known for their high antioxidant capacity, with a single serving providing a significant amount of vitamins C and K, as well as manganese. Strawberries are rich in vitamin C and ellagic acid, a polyphenol antioxidant that has been shown to have anti-inflammatory properties. Raspberries are high in vitamin C, manganese, and fiber, and contain a range of polyphenolic compounds that have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Pomegranate seeds are rich in punicalagins, which are powerful antioxidants that have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and anti-cancer properties.

You can mix these fruits together in a bowl, add a splash of lemon juice, and enjoy as a healthy and delicious snack. This combination provides a boost of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals that can help protect against cell damage, inflammation, and oxidative stress.
